description: Brazilian criminal faction originating in Fortaleza, Ceará, founded on January 1, 2016. It was the second largest faction in Ceará state, involved in drug trafficking, robberies, extortion, and rebellions. The group gained notoriety for orchestrating waves of attacks against public and private property in 2017 and 2019, allying with the PCC and Bonde dos 40 against the Comando Vermelho. It became defunct in 2025.
